geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation expanded boundary 2022, Tambaram municipality merged wards, CMDA master plan zone delineation

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Kancheepuram district tables (Tambaram taluk), rapid residential growth estimated at 3.2% CAGR post-2010

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu peri-urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, Tambaram area employment pattern estimation

commute_profile.data_source: Southern Railway Tambaram line ridership data 2023, CMP Chennai 2018, MTC route data for Tambaram-Chennai routes, commuter belt long-distance pattern

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from lower-income commuter belt patterns, high fare sensitivity due to long commute distances, lower trust in railways due to overcrowding issues

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban residential patterns, commuter community bonds, lower agent density in sprawl zone

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Tambaram railway station daily passenger count (Southern Railway), station area commercial activity
Estimated from Tambaram shandy (weekly market) activity, local vendor census

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Periurban/Low Connectivity template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable to Tambaram commuter belt

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from Tambaram municipality councillors, suburban railway commuter associations
